chinese_news.title: 00后创业者站上C位，「go big or go home」｜36氪离线聚会第二期
chinese_news.summary:
“妨碍真理发现过程的，不是谎言，而是极其精辟的错误见解。”德国物理学家兼讽刺作家利希滕贝格在面对启蒙运动中的种种愚昧时，戏谑式地写下了这一句名言。

许多误判之所以危险，恰恰因为它们看上去过于正确。它们能在一个短周期里解释世界，也容易在世界已经变化之后，继续以“共识”的面貌停留在原地。

AI也曾经历类似的混沌阶段。过去两年，人们习惯用一些简单指标理解这场变化：谁拥有更多GPU，谁训练了更大参数的模型，谁的团队烧掉了更多Token。以至于硅谷一度流行“Token消耗量”的隐形竞赛，以证明到底谁是最AI&

chinese_news.title: 实现芯片设计验证自动化，提升开发效率10倍以上，「智维创芯」完成数千万元天使轮融资｜36氪首发
chinese_news.summary:
从芯片行业在资本市场的狂飙，到华为发布“韬（τ）定律”，AI浪潮带动下，烈火烹油的半导体行业进入超级周期，推动芯片设计等上游产业链迎来需求爆发。

但随着需求暴增，设计复杂度不断提高，芯片验证周期过长，拖累开发节奏的瓶颈也越来越明显。2024年西门子和威尔逊研究集团的研究报告中指出高工艺复杂芯片的流片风险非常大，首次流片成功率只有14%。“一款芯片从架构到流片一般需要两年时间，其中验证环节消耗的人力与时间往往超过60%。”王翕对36氪表示。

数字芯片开发流程

王

chinese_news.title: 氪星晚报 ｜OpenAI首席财务官谈公司AI设备：今年年底前将正式发布；腾讯客服回应与华为、小米等合作；香港推出首个生产力级超级智能体
chinese_news.summary:
大公司：

OpenAI首席财务官谈公司AI设备：今年年底前将正式发布

OpenAI首席财务官Sarah Friar日前在受访时透露，已经亲自体验过OpenAI的AI设备。她表示到“今年年底之前”OpenAI将正式发布这款产品。此前，OpenAI曾在一份文件中表示，预计最早也要到2027年2月才会开始发货。（财联社）

LG Innotek计划扩建半导体基板工厂

LG Innotek将于下月开始扩建其位于越南的半导体基板工厂。此次扩建将通过其越南生产子公司的直接投资进行，计划2027年5月竣工。（新浪财经）

鸿海与SK集团深化AI基础设施合作

鸿海表示，董事长刘扬伟近日会见韩国SK集团会长崔泰源，双方就全球AI产业发展进行探讨，包括AI服务器、AI数据中心及能源解决方案等领域的合作，以深化新世代AI基础设施的竞争力。双方亦针对机器人、能源管理与电池技术等领域进行交流。（界面

chinese_news.title: 36氪独家｜2026 年字节 AI 的四个关键命题
chinese_news.summary:
文｜周鑫雨

编辑｜张雨忻 杨轩

《智能涌现》从多个信源处独家获悉，2026 年，字节 AI 有四个重要的命题：

加大对世界模型训练的投入，年底前，模型性能达到现阶段世界模型全球  SOTA（最佳）Google Genie 3 的水平。

视频模型继续保持领先地位，探索“动态生成”等新方向。

进一步打好 Coding 的地基，做好 Coding 的 Dogfooding（数据回流、评测，形成飞轮），提升 Agent 能力。

豆包强化商业化能力，重点场景是“办公”。

字节的未竟之地：世界模型

如今，字节的 AI 矩阵中，有让字节终于得以进入中国大模型第一梯队的 Seed 2.0，还有做到

chinese_news.title: 李宁需要库里，但库里更需要李宁
chinese_news.summary:
作者 | 谢芸子

编辑 | 张帆 

一条消息让体育圈炸了锅。

6月2日，NBA球星斯蒂芬·库里与中国运动品牌李宁，签下了一为期十年的代言。双方均未披露具体金额，但业内口径相当统一：这是一份总价超过4亿美元（约合27亿元人民币）的超级合同。

据多方信息，库里每年保底可获3000万美元的代言费，还能从其个人品牌Curry Brand的销售中得到提成，外加李宁的流通股股权激励。这套“高保底+销售分成+股权”的组合模式，完全对标耐克当年给迈克尔·乔丹的待遇。

库里的江湖地位毋庸置疑：他是“NBA历史上最具革命性影响的球员之一”，控卫历史第二，是“小球时代”的奠基人。

今年4月，《今日美国》评选“NBA历史25大巨星”，库里排名第四，紧随乔丹、詹姆斯、科比之后。在更多专业体育媒体的排名中，库里多在第十到第十三位。从实力、流量到市场好感度，库里拥有体育品牌渴望的一切。股价的短期反应却和这一

chinese_news.title: 深圳具身公司获得汇川、中国电信亿元融资，“视触觉”传感器出货量行业第一｜硬氪首发
chinese_news.summary:
作者｜黄楠

编辑｜袁斯来

硬氪获悉，戴盟机器人近日完成亿元A轮融资，由汇川技术旗下产业基金汇川产投与中国电信联合投资。资金将用于进一步打造超大规模含物理交互信息数据集，加速物理世界模型研发、并驱动真实物理场景下的数据飞轮与商业闭环。

戴盟机器人于2023年正式运营，核心团队长期聚焦机器人灵巧操作与物理交互智能领域。联合创始人兼首席科学家王煜教授曾任港科大机器人研究院创始院长，他所提出的“具身技能”与“技能克隆”等概念，是戴盟机器人核心技术路线的重要组成部分。创始人兼CEO段江哗博士及主要技术负责人，均来自港科大机器人研究院核心团队，具备10年操作智能Know-how。首席AI科学家原玮浩曾为阿里通义实验室多模态研究专家，拥有将世界模型迁移至机器人物理操作的前沿经验。

具身智能热度持续走高的当下，行业逻辑正在发生深刻切换。赛道发展沿着一条清晰的脉络演进：从早期机器人行走与运动控制能力的比拼，到差异化算法架构路线与“具身大脑”的探索，每轮热点轮动都为其突破积累了关键基础。

随着人形落地从舞台演示

chinese_news.title: 深创投领投，这家微型关节模组企业完成数千万融资丨36氪首发
chinese_news.summary:
作者丨欧雪

编辑丨袁斯来

硬氪获悉，微型高性能电机企业指尖智擎近期完成数千万元Pre-A轮融资，由深创投领投，天启资本与卓源亚洲跟投。资金将主要用于新一代微型轴向磁通电机的量产爬坡、空心杯电机产线建设及全球头部客户的供应链交付保障。多维资本担任本轮独家财务顾问。

指尖智擎成立于2024年8月，公司主打产品包括微型轴向磁通关节模组与空心杯电机，核心应用场景覆盖灵巧手、消费级机器人、轻型机械臂及医疗设备等领域。公司创始人张杨拥有12年电机行业经验，曾就职于美的、威孚高科、图达通等企业。

chinese_news.title: 8点1氪丨A股第4只两千元股诞生；问界回应浙江台州M9事故；马斯克个人财富将突破万亿美元
chinese_news.summary:
今日热点导览

  • 名创优品称会员买单仅限潮玩商品
  • 谷歌扩大Quick Share与AirDrop互传适配范围，覆盖更多安卓机型
  • Meta在全球范围扩大青少年内容管控
  • 多家银行下架3年期5年期定期存款

TOP 3大新闻

A股第4只两千元股诞生，联讯仪器盘中股价冲破2000元

6月3日，联讯仪器盘中股价冲破2000元，最高达2047.88元。公司总市值超2000亿元。数据显示，自A股1990年12月19日开市以来，最高价曾突破2000元的股票屈指可数，仅有中安科、贵州茅台、云赛智联3只。这3只股票的上涨动因各异，长期市场表现也大相径庭。与A股史上前3只最高价曾触及2000元的股票相比，联讯仪器的硬科技成色鲜明。公司是全球少数、国内极少数量产供应400G/800G/1.6T光速光模块核心测试仪器的厂商，并已逐步在半导体测试设备领域形成“第二增长曲线”。（上海证券报）

investment_theses.thesis: Bitcoin outperforms SPY through year-end 2026 as geopolitical premium (Iran diplomacy uncertainty, Ukraine stalemate) and institutional reserve demand (52K Q1 BTC dump was capitulation, not regime shift) drive USD/commodity correlation reversion.
supporting_signals: Professional investors dumped 52K BTC in Q1 2026 ETF outflows (Cointelegraph) — classic late-cycle distribution, now pricing in stabilization
Trump Iran meeting signal (CNBC) removes tail-risk premium that had supported USD; geopolitical hedge demand (Zelensky–Putin talks, Hezbollah ceasefire rejection) favors non-correlated assets
CoinDesk 'Dr. Doom' Atlas Capital thesis (70% crash before $500K) is contrarian capitulation indicator; CoinDesk Tom Lee $250K ETH target implies continued institutional accumulation narrative
investment_theses.counter_view: If Fed remains hawkish (rate cuts delayed into 2027) or Treasury yields spike on fiscal concerns, USD strength and real rates will suppress speculative BTC demand; regulatory crackdown on US crypto custody (Crypto Clarity Act negotiations per CoinDesk) could trigger institutional exit.
investment_theses.expression: Long BTC spot ETF (iShares or Grayscale) or BTC/USD perps; hedge with short SPY or long DXY calls to isolate geopolitical reversion trade

investment_theses.thesis: Nvidia underperforms mega-cap tech through Q3 2026 as Senate export-control hearing (Warren–Huang) creates regulatory overhang; China sales guidance becomes material uncertainty, but equity market reprices risk higher in Q4 2026 when ByteDance world-model SOTA announcement (36Kr year-end target) signals AI capex cycle remains intact.
supporting_signals: CNBC: Warren invites Huang to Senate hearing on China AI chip sales — formal regulatory scrutiny is scheduled; Q2 earnings call (July 2026) will face direct China revenue questions
36Kr (China-first): ByteDance committing to world-model SOTA by year-end 2026 (Genie 3 competitor) — signals AI infrastructure demand remains robust despite geopolitical noise
CoinDesk: AI chip boom scrutiny ongoing, but tokenization/DeFi on Ethereum (Coinbase mortgage DeFi summer 2026 launch) implies continued enterprise cloud capex
investment_theses.counter_view: If Trump pursues aggressive China tariffs or further export bans on advanced chips, Nvidia's China revenue (currently ~25% of revenue) faces structural headwind; competing GPU suppliers (AMD, Intel) could gain share if supply constraints ease.
investment_theses.expression: Short NVDA stock or sell call spreads (NVDA $150/$160 short calls expiring Sept 2026); pair with long AMD or XLK sector etf to hedge AI capex thesis

investment_theses.thesis: Ethereum outperforms Bitcoin (BTC/ETH ratio compresses to <22) in Q3–Q4 2026 as Layer 2 consolidation (CoinDesk: 'many L2s dying') drives capital concentration into Ethereum-settled staking/tokenization plays; Coinbase mortgage DeFi launch (summer 2026) provides institutional on-ramp.
supporting_signals: CoinDesk: Layer 2 consolidation is accelerating; general-purpose chains losing narrative support — implies Ethereum L1 + Arbitrum/Optimism duopoly capturing 80%+ of L2 value
Cointelegraph: Coinbase mortgage token-backed down payments launching summer 2026 — first major regulated US fintech use case for ERC-20; institutional demand signal
Hacker News (AI/ML): Anthropic open-source vulnerability discovery framework; AI-powered blockchain analysis gaining traction — Ethereum security/compliance narrative strengthens
investment_theses.counter_view: If Ethereum Shanghai-era upgrades disappoint (staking yield compression) or if Solana/SUI (trending tokens) capture mindshare due to lower fees, Ethereum relative outperformance fails; BTC reserve asset demand may remain dominant in macro downturn.
investment_theses.expression: Long ETH spot or ETH/USD perpetuals; short BTC or buy BTC/ETH put spreads (sell 25 call, buy 20 put, expiring Oct 2026) to express compression thesis

investment_theses.thesis: US Treasuries 10-year yield rises 50–75bps by Oct 31, 2026 as Iran geopolitical premium unwinds (Trump diplomacy) and Fed maintains restrictive real rates; DXY rallies to >110, pressuring EM and crypto emerging from current consolidation.
supporting_signals: CNBC: Trump says he could meet Iran's supreme leader to make a deal — removes tail-risk geopolitical premium that had supported safe-haven bonds; fiscal concerns (US budget trajectory) remain unresolved
CoinDesk: Professional BTC ETF outflows (52K dumped Q1) signal institutional de-risking; if UST yields rise, carry-trade unwinding amplifies volatility
Zelensky–Putin direct talks (BBC) signal Ukraine fatigue, reducing European flight-to-safety demand for US Treasuries
investment_theses.counter_view: If recession concerns re-surface or geopolitical tension escalates (Hezbollah ceasefire collapse, etc.), flight-to-safety demand keeps UST yields compressed and DXY supported by lower real rates.
investment_theses.expression: Short 10-year UST futures or sell UST bond ETFs (TLT); long DXY or short emerging-market currencies (Mexican peso, Indian rupee); pair with BTC hedge (long small BTC position) for asymmetric geopolitical tail-risk

investment_theses.thesis: Hyperliquid (HYPE token, trending) consolidates below $150 through Q3 2026 as Arthur Hayes exit (CoinDesk: 'exit position shy of $150 price target') signals insider distribution; altcoin narrative exhaustion and BTC-dominance cycle favor larger tokens (Bonk, Sui, Near) with genuine user adoption over leveraged-trading tokens.
supporting_signals: CoinDesk: Hyperliquid pulls back from record highs as Arthur Hayes exits position shy of $150 — insider distribution signal; decoupling from HYPE momentum

Hacker News: Failing grades soar with AI usage in Berkeley CS (712 score) — implies next wave of ML infrastructure demand will favor established, proven platforms (OpenAI, Anthropic) not leverage tokens
Trending tokens: BONK (Solana), SUI, NEAR showing organic community adoption; HYPE is primarily used for perpetual leverage, not application layer
investment_theses.counter_view: If crypto market enters new bull phase (BTC >$70K+) and leverage trading re-accelerates, HYPE can rerate to $200+; liquidity concentration on Hyperliquid DEX grows network effects.
investment_theses.expression: Short HYPE token or sell HYPE/USDC spot; long BONK, SUI, or NEAR on relative basis; use ratio spreads (short 2x HYPE, long 1x SUI) to hedge against broad crypto rally while maintaining structural thesis

china_first_signals: 36Kr: OpenAI CFO Sarah Friar disclosed hardware launch 'by end of 2026' — contradicts prior 2027 shipping guidance, suggesting accelerated timeline not yet covered in English media
36Kr: ByteDance's 2026 AI priorities include world-model SOTA (Genie 3 competitor) by year-end — signals Chinese AI infrastructure capex cycle remains robust, relevant to Nvidia/chip demand forecasts

36Kr: Daiming Robotics (embodied AI) raised ¥100M+ from Huisuan Zhongrui (HuiChuan subsidiary) + China Telecom — indicates strategic interest in physical AI/robotics from telecom infrastructure players; not yet mainstream English coverage

36Kr: Zhizhi Chuanqi (micro-motor specialist) raised ¥tens of millions for joint-articulation modular production — signals robotics supply-chain consolidation in China, upstream of OpenAI/Anthropic hardware competition
